untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of pullback retracement depth (23.6%+ of prior move) and confirmation of trend resumption, which cannot be objectively expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. Pullback detection requires tracking prior swing highs/lows and calculating retracement percentages dynamically—functionality not available in the allowed indicator set. ATR-based stop loss also requires contextual calculation (0.5 ATR below pullback low) that depends on identified pullback level.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses sma_10 as trend confirmation (10-15 period MA per signal) crossed by price as pullback resumption proxy. Stop loss converted to ATR-based percentage equivalent. However, core pullback identification and retracement measurement logic cannot be captured without custom bar-level tracking or indicator calculation not in the allowed set.
